name: Towbook Towing & Roadside Management API
what_it_does: Towbook REST API for towing company dispatch and management software. Enables AI agents to manage tow call dispatch and driver assignments, access vehicle pickup and impound records, integrate with motor club providers (AAA, Agero, Urgent.ly), process invoicing and payment collection, manage impound lot inventory with vehicle tracking, retrieve GPS driver location data, access compliance and reporting data for law enforcement releases, and connect towing operations with insurance and fleet management systems.
use_cases: Dispatching tow calls and managing driver assignments from towing operations agents
Managing impound lot vehicle inventory from vehicle storage agents
Processing motor club call integrations from service automation agents
Retrieving invoicing and payment data from billing management agents
not_for: General field service without towing-specific dispatch and impound workflows
Fleet management without roadside and towing operations
best_when: A towing company, roadside service provider, or impound lot using Towbook wants AI agents to automate dispatch, driver management, impound tracking, motor club integration, and billing workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Vehicle pickup and impound records may include personal vehicle and owner data. Law enforcement release compliance requires proper authorization documentation. Driver GPS tracking requires worker disclosure.

auth.notes: Towbook uses API key and OAuth 2.0 for API access. Company-level credentials. Motor club integration via dedicated connectors. Partner program for technology integrations. Webhooks for real-time call status updates.

pricing.paid_tiers: Monthly per-truck pricing; plans based on fleet size
pricing.notes: Flint, Michigan. Founded 2010. Market leader for towing company management software. 10,000+ towing companies. Motor club integrations with AAA, Agero, Allstate, Geico, Urgent.ly, and others. Strong impound lot management. Competes with Dispatch Anywhere and TOPS for towing software.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Vehicle impound records include owner PII and law enforcement data
No public MCP server — OAuth2 and API key with partner program
Law enforcement tow releases require proper authorization — automation must not bypass release procedures
Motor club integration (AAA, Agero) uses separate API connectors — not unified API
Driver GPS tracking must comply with state fleet tracking disclosure laws
Impound lien sale workflows have state-specific compliance requirements
agent_readiness.security_notes: Vehicle and owner PII, law enforcement data. PCI-DSS. OAuth2 + API key. US/Canadian data residency. Law enforcement release compliance mandatory.

security_score_components.security_notes: Vehicle and owner PII. PCI-DSS. OAuth2 + API key. US/Canadian residency. Law enforcement release compliance.
